emails.subject: Vacation Request -
emails.body: Vacation Request Please be advised, I am planning to take the week of Vacation, 8/7-11/2000, unless this creates a conflict within the group. I will notify, Brenda Whitehead so she can arrange coverage for my desk, as soon as I receive your approval. Thank you for your consideration. Taffy
